evaluations.summary: The artifact numbers context-gathering items as 1-4 and also starts execution steps at 1 without labeling context-gathering as a precondition phase before Step 1.
evaluations.evidence_quote:
<context-gathering>
1. Read the role definition request and validate against schema
evaluations.why_it_matters: This mixes precondition work into the numbered flow and creates the exact ambiguity the rule is meant to prevent: it is unclear whether validation is a precondition or part of Step 1, which can confuse execution order and governance interpretation.
